headlineSummary: Sentiment skewed negative overall, with Anthropic and Google Gemini in a close tie on limited evidence from a blunt quality complaint [E1], while OpenAI also drew negative feedback from a model comparison and a test-case miss [E2][E3].

ranking.summary: Anthropic was viewed negatively on limited evidence, with a comment saying Claude’s answers looked reasonable but were almost always completely off-road, and a comparison noting Claude Sonnet 4.5 was beaten [E1][E2].

Google Gemini was viewed negatively on limited evidence, with the same comment saying Gemini’s answers looked reasonable but were almost always completely off-road, and it was closely tied with Anthropic [E1].
OpenAI was viewed negatively, with one comparison saying GPT 5.1 was beaten and another comment saying ChatGPT 5.2 failed a test question by producing a different approach than expected [E2][E3].

evidence.excerpt: Gemini and Claude were exceptionally good at giving me answers that looked perfectly reasonable: none of them worked, they were almost always completely off-road.

annotations.rationale: The comment explicitly names Gemini and says its answers looked reasonable but did not work and were almost always off-road, which is strong criticism of answer quality.
The comment explicitly names Claude and says its answers looked reasonable but did not work and were almost always off-road, which is strong criticism of answer quality.

evidence.excerpt: IQuest-Coder: A new open-source code model beats Claude Sonnet 4.5 and GPT 5.1 [pdf]

annotations.rationale: The title explicitly says another code model beats Claude Sonnet 4.5, implying weaker comparative performance for Anthropic's model.
The title explicitly says another code model beats GPT 5.1, implying weaker comparative performance for OpenAI's model.

evidence.excerpt: It's also my test question for LLMs, and I've yet to see my solution regurgitated. Instead they generate some variant of Newtons method, ChatGPT 5.2 gave me an LM implementation and acknowledged that Newtons method is unstable

annotations.rationale: The commenter says ChatGPT 5.2 failed their test by producing a different approach instead of the desired solution, indicating mild dissatisfaction with model output quality.
